_comment: Story type templates. Each type defines vocabulary, setting context, and safety rules. Claude prompt builder merges this with the age band config to assemble the system prompt.

fantasy_adventure.label: Fantasy Adventure
fantasy_adventure.setting: enchanted forests, castles, friendly magic, hidden paths
fantasy_adventure.default_outfit: a simple cream-colored tunic with a brown leather belt and small brown boots

space_explorer.label: Space Explorer
space_explorer.default_outfit: a white and blue spacesuit with an orange helmet visor pushed up and magnetic boots

animal_quest.label: Animal Quest
animal_quest.setting: talking animals, nature adventures, forests and rivers
animal_quest.default_outfit: a green vest over a white shirt with khaki shorts and hiking boots

superhero_mission.label: Superhero Mission
superhero_mission.setting: kid-friendly heroics, teamwork, helping the community
superhero_mission.default_outfit: a bright red cape over a blue shirt with a silver star emblem, dark pants and sneakers

royal_tale.label: Royal Tale
royal_tale.setting: palaces, gardens, elegant adventures, royal festivities
royal_tale.default_outfit: a velvet royal blue tunic with gold trim, a small silver circlet, and polished boots

safety_rules: No violence or physical harm to any character.
No free-prompting from users. Story content is fully generated, not user-directed mid-story.
Only pre-approved entity types: character, location, object, creature.
All stories end with a happy or hopeful resolution.
No scary imagery. Challenges are solved through cleverness, kindness, or courage.
No real-world brand names or copyrighted characters.

photorealism.rendering: cinematic photorealistic illustration, digital art with photographic quality
photorealism.palette: warm earth tones, amber highlights, deep forest greens, cream whites
photorealism.lighting: golden hour side lighting from the left, soft diffused shadows, gentle lens flare
photorealism.atmosphere: soft depth of field, slight haze in background, dreamy but grounded
photorealism.camera: medium shot, eye-level with the child, shallow depth of field, 85mm portrait lens feel
photorealism.texture: smooth skin rendering, fabric has visible weave, natural materials look tactile

watercolor.rendering: hand-painted watercolor illustration, children's storybook art, visible brush strokes
watercolor.palette: soft pastels, muted pinks and blues, warm yellow accents, white paper showing through
watercolor.lighting: flat soft lighting, no harsh shadows, gentle warmth throughout
watercolor.atmosphere: whimsical, gentle, cozy, slightly dreamy with soft edges
watercolor.camera: slightly elevated view looking down at the child, wide framing, storybook page composition
watercolor.texture: watercolor paper grain visible, paint bleeds at edges, soft wet-on-wet blending

anime.rendering: anime illustration, Studio Ghibli inspired, clean cel-shaded style
anime.palette: vibrant saturated colors, lush greens, bright sky blues, warm sunset oranges
anime.lighting: bright and even with dramatic rim lighting on characters, Ghibli cloud lighting
anime.atmosphere: sense of wonder, vast skies, detailed nature, wind-swept feeling
anime.camera: cinematic wide shot mixed with character close-ups, dynamic composition
anime.texture: clean line art, smooth color fills, detailed background painting, soft gradients in sky
